name: Social Credit Simulator
short_description: In Social Credit Simulator, you make life-altering decisions by assigning social credit scores based on people’s actions and status. Satirizing real-world social rating systems, your choices determine your survival in a dystopian regime.
detailed_description:
Social Credit Simulator puts you in control of a powerful role in a satirical take on social credit systems. As the enforcer of a totalitarian regime, you evaluate individuals based on their actions, social status, and occupation. The fate of society and your own survival rests on the decisions you make. Earn rewards from the ruling party if you align with their expectations, but missteps could cost you dearly. Balance your actions to secure enough resources for yourself and your family while navigating the challenges of a system where every decision counts.



Key Features:
  • Satirical commentary on social credit systems
  • Moral choices that impact the game's outcome
  • Dynamic difficulty that evolves with your decisions
  • Unique soundtrack and immersive pixel art
  • Resource management for survival
